query: SELECT r.id, r.customer_name AS clientName, r.booking_date AS scheduledDate, r.people AS numberOfPersons, r.status, COALESCE(e.title, r.product_name) AS activityTitle, ro.client_confirmed AS clientConfirmed, ro.id AS opId FROM reservations r LEFT JOIN experiences e ON r.product_id = e.id LEFT JOIN reservation_operational ro ON ro.reservation_id = r.id AND ro.reservation_type = 'activity' WHERE r.booking_date >= '2026-03-23' AND r.booking_date <= '2026-03-30' AND r.status NOT IN ('cancelled','failed') ORDER BY r.booking_date ASC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute SELECT r.id, r.customer_name AS clientName, r.booking_date AS scheduledDate, r.people AS numberOfPersons, r.status, COALESCE(e.title, r.product_name) AS activityTitle, ro.client_confirmed AS clientConfirmed, ro.id AS opId FROM reservations r LEFT JOIN experiences e ON r.product_id = e.id LEFT JOIN reservation_operational ro ON ro.reservation_id = r.id AND ro.reservation_type = 'activity' WHERE r.booking_date >= '2026-03-23' AND r.booking_date <= '2026-03-30' AND r.status NOT IN ('cancelled','failed') ORDER BY r.booking_date ASC;
